core_mechanism: a stationary-point-preserving deformation of a potential/energy landscape by an additive control term, with local stability of each preserved critical point governed by a single-parameter Hessian (second-derivative) positive-definiteness threshold that flips it between minimum and saddle
brief_reason: The abstract proposes a variant of uplifting that adds an energy contribution while 'exactly preserving' the critical points of the potential, and derives 'a simple stability condition depending solely on the amount of uplifting' — i.e. a one-parameter Hessian criterion for when a stationary point stays a minimum.
